metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for UE5 shaders, design systems, image generation, AI task management, and multi-model orchestration

plugins.name: shader-nodes
plugins.description: UE5.5 shader development: HLSL design (Opus) + Material Graph generation (Sonnet) + paste into Material Editor

plugins.name: reality-reprojection
plugins.description: Apply the Reality Reprojection design system to any web project — generate components, convert existing code, review compliance

plugins.name: image-gen
plugins.description: Generate, edit, and refine images using Google Gemini and OpenAI GPT Image 1.5. Supports transparent backgrounds, multi-turn refinement, and game asset creation.

plugins.name: codex-dispatch
plugins.description: Dispatch tasks to OpenAI Codex CLI for parallel execution with GPT/o-series models. Diversity of thought, cost-optimized sub-tasks, and independent parallel work.

plugins.name: taskmaster
plugins.description: Universal AI-powered task and backlog management. Kanban viewer, session tracking, worktree isolation, dependency graphs, and quality gates. Drop into any project.
